creator: seschwar@gmail.com
text:
Created attachment 201899
clojure-1.10.0.411.patch

Clojure 1.10.0 was release on 2018-12-03: https://github.com/clojure/clojure/blob/clojure-1.10.0/changes.md#changes-to-clojure-in-version-110

It now requires Java 8 or later.  This requirement was already present in the port's Makefile.

The port build cleanly under Poudriere on FreeBSD:12:amd64.
